locations US, CA, Santa Clara

Qualifications

json_ld_job_postings.title: ASIC Design Engineer - New College Grad 2026
json_ld_job_postings.description: Responsibilities: Design and verify RTL for complex memory subsystem designs, collaborate with architecture and verification teams, and improve design quality. Qualifications: Experience with Verilog, digital design, computer architecture, synthesis, timing analysis, and clear technical communication.
